comparison: kernel-only single-launch: AMK vm.relaunch() vs cuBLAS CUDA-graph g.replay(); same 1-token decode; per-sample paired-interleaved; median of medians over rounds

int8_quality_vs_bf16_eager.note: int8 weight-only is near-lossless (not bit-exact); paper shows 100% greedy-token agreement on SmolLM2-135M

honesty: Fair kernel-only single-launch comparison (both are one GPU launch doing the whole forward). int8 is weight-only (W8A16), near-lossless, compared to cuBLAS bf16 — a standard inference mode; precision difference stated explicitly. All latencies are CUDA-event medians, paired-interleaved (drift-robust).
